creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Isn't there someone who could review and commit these improvements? 2 years without any response from the devs is bad.

I really would like to see BT improvements in FreeBSD. More and more devices uses BT, but BT in FreeBSD is...

There is also a Blued from the same author
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-bluetooth/2022-June/000006.html
https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-bluetooth/2022-August/000021.html
